_comment: MCP server template — PostgreSQL read-only access. Replace all <FILL_IN> values. Never commit real credentials; use $ENV_VAR references.
name: postgres
description: Read-only query access to the service's PostgreSQL database

env.DATABASE_URL: <FILL_IN: set this env var to your Postgres connection string, e.g. postgres://user:pass@host:5432/dbname>

_notes: This template uses the official @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres package.
For read-write access, create a separate postgres-readwrite.json and require explicit team-lead approval before enabling.
Limit the database user's privileges to SELECT on the schemas Claude needs — do not use a superuser account.
If your database requires SSL, append ?sslmode=require to the connection string.
